details: The agent correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending/Unschedulable → because PVC 'data-cache' is unbound → because StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is available). All steps were supported by actual kubectl-axi command outputs, including the ProvisioningFailed event confirming the missing StorageClass.
